title: ʻOihana Pilina
attention: ʻAʻole i hana ʻia kēia papahana pilina no ka hoʻolaha o nā 'lālā ʻohana' a i ʻole 'nā mea kūʻai.' E heluhelu i {faqLink} ma mua o ka hoʻomau.
earnPerSale: Loaʻa {amount} no kēlā me kēia kūʻai mea kūʻai hou!

copiedToClipboard: Ua kope ʻia i ka clipboard.

paymentSetup.title: Hoʻonohonoho Uku
